pattern: Slide a window of length three across the string and count each position whose three characters are pairwise distinct.
hints: Only windows of exactly three characters matter, so consider each starting index up to length minus three.
A window is good when all three characters differ from one another.
Increment a counter whenever s[i], s[i+1], and s[i+2] are mutually distinct.

edge_inputs.description: several good windows including a repeat substring
too short to have any window

stress.description: random lowercase strings over a small alphabet to force repeats
